steps.label: Name Your Character
steps.prompt: Who are you in this desperate march?

options.label: Captain Vane
options.description: A scarred veteran who leads from the front

options.label: The Defector
options.description: A Crown officer who switched sides

options.label: The Mercenary
options.description: Loyal only to coin and survival

options.label: The Mystic
options.description: A seer who reads the fire and the wind

options.label: Brother Ash
options.description: The Zealot — faith burns brighter than fear

options.label: Lady Miren
options.description: The Fallen Noble — duty over comfort

options.label: The Faceless
options.description: The Anarchist — no gods, no masters

options.label: Sergeant Kell
options.description: The backbone — holds the line when all else fails

options.label: The Governor
options.description: Controls the border and the law

options.label: The Justiciar
options.description: The letter of the law, without mercy

options.label: The Merchant Prince
options.description: Financial authority, everything has a price

options.label: The Court Astrologer
options.description: Arcane authority, fate is his instrument
